revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template replaces the first character of the argument with its [[HTML entity]] if it is one of four wiki markup characters : ; * #. This can sometimes fix the issue at [[Help:Template#Problems and workarounds]] where a character may be processed as though it were at the beginning of a line. == Usage == {{Tlx|Encodefirst|}} == Examples == The output looks like the input whether a character is replaced or not. {{Tlx|Encodefirst|*Lisp}} produces: {{Encodefirst|*Lisp}} But the output will behave differently from the input in some situations where it is processed. For example, {{tl|la}} fails as of August 2017 if its argument starts with *. {{la|*Lisp}} causes the asterisk to be processed as [[Help:Wiki markup#Lists|list markup]] and produces broken display. {{la|{{Encodefirst|*Lisp}}}} works correctly: {{la|{{Encodefirst|*Lisp}}}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Text-specific formatting and function templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Encodefirst%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template replaces the first character of the argument with its [[HTML entity]] if it is one of four wiki markup characters : ; * #. This can sometimes fix the issue at [[Help:Template#Problems and workarounds]] where a character may be processed as though it were at the beginning of a line. == Usage == {{Tlx|Encodefirst|}} == Examples == The output looks like the input whether a character is replaced or not. {{Tlx|Encodefirst|*Lisp}} produces: {{Encodefirst|*Lisp}} But the output will behave differently from the input in some situations where it is processed. For example, {{tl|la}} fails as of August 2017 if its argument starts with *. {{la|*Lisp}} causes the asterisk to be processed as [[Help:Wiki markup#Lists|list markup]] and produces broken display. {{la|{{Encodefirst|*Lisp}}}} works correctly: {{la|{{Encodefirst|*Lisp}}}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Text-specific formatting and function templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template replaces the first character of the argument with its [[HTML entity]] if it is one of four wiki markup characters : ; * #. This can sometimes fix the issue at [[Help:Template#Problems and workarounds]] where a character may be processed as though it were at the beginning of a line. == Usage == {{Tlx|Encodefirst|}} == Examples == The output looks like the input whether a character is replaced or not. {{Tlx|Encodefirst|*Lisp}} produces: {{Encodefirst|*Lisp}} But the output will behave differently from the input in some situations where it is processed. For example, {{tl|la}} fails as of August 2017 if its argument starts with *. {{la|*Lisp}} causes the asterisk to be processed as [[Help:Wiki markup#Lists|list markup]] and produces broken display. {{la|{{Encodefirst|*Lisp}}}} works correctly: {{la|{{Encodefirst|*Lisp}}}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Text-specific formatting and function templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
